Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for Public Administrator.

The Court noted that no one is here to object. Ms. Boessenecker stated that she has not heard from anyone. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
